title: Social Media Manager is Now Live on monday.com! Introducing Social Media Manager: Effortless Social Campaigns in monday.com
excerpt:
We’re excited to announce the launch of Social Media Manager for monday.com, your new all-in-one solution for planning, scheduling, and publishing social content—right where your team already works! :tada: 
With Social M…

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re excited to announce the launch of Social Media Manager for monday.com, your new all-in-one solution for planning, scheduling, and publishing social content—right where your team already works!

With Social Media Manager, you can:

  • Connect Instagram and Facebook accounts (with LinkedIn, X, and TikTok integrations coming soon!)

  • Plan, draft, approve, and schedule posts directly from your monday.com boards—no more switching tools or tabs

  • Track engagement and performance to see what resonates, and optimize your content for better results

Whether you’re coordinating campaigns, collaborating on content, or reporting on ROI, Social Media Manager brings clarity, visibility, and effortless control to social media marketing inside monday.com. Try it now and streamline your social workflows!

SMM4M_mpac_screenshot_1_300dpi1920×960 84.1 KB

posts.author: Divettazi (Divettazi)
posts.cookedHtml: You can plan posts, schedule them, and track how they perform right from your board, and more account options are coming soon, which makes keeping everything in one place way easier.
